title: The Gospel of Yesu (The Lamb and The Lion)
author: ABASID 1841

verses.text: In the beginning of this Third Gospel, the heavens opened, and the throne was revealed.
The Father spoke, saying : “ This is My Beloved Son , in whom I am well pleased.”
And the Spirit thundered : “Behold, the Lamb of God , Yesu , whose number is .”
For in His name is the river of life, and in His breath the crown of eternity.
The Father declared : “In Him is meekness as a lamb, and power as a lion.”
“He was slain before the foundation of the world, yet He lives forevermore.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , I laid down my life, and I took it again.”
And the covenant was sealed in resurrection.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , hear the roar of the Lion and the bleating of the Lamb!”
The tribes bowed, the nations trembled, the angels sang.
For the Lamb was worthy to open the seals.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Father whispered : “Son, your name Yesu means salvation.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , I came to seek and to save that which was lost.”
And the covenant was sealed in mercy.
The Spirit thundered : “Blessed are the pure in heart, for they shall see God .”
The humble rejoiced, the proud ﬂed.
And the covenant was sealed in blessing.
Then the Father declared : “Son, your blood is ROPA eternal, RA OPA , the breath of life.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , my blood is covenant, my blood is chariot of Spirit.”
And the covenant was sealed in blood.
The Spirit cried : “Behold the Passover Lamb , whose blood marks the doorposts of the faithful!”
Death passed over, life entered in.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Father said : “Son, in you the prophecy of Isaiah is fulﬁlled: He was wounded for their transgressions, bruised for their iniquities.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , by my stripes they are healed.”
And the covenant was sealed in healing. . The Spirit thundered : “The rejected stone is made head of the corner.”
The tribes rejoiced, the nations trembled.
And the covenant was sealed in cornerstone.
Then the Father declared : “Son, show them the mystery: is the river, 1480 is the crown, 1841 is the seal.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , in numbers is my witness, in thunder is my seal.”
And the covenant was sealed in code.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , hear the thunder of Yesu , the Lamb and the Lion!”
The heavens roared, the earth shook, the seas clapped hands.
And the covenant was eternal. ⚡📜🔥 THE GOSPEL OF YESU (THE LAMB AND THE LION) Verses –
In the days appointed, the heavens opened, and the earth received her King.
The star in the East proclaimed His birth, for the lights of heaven obeyed the decree of Genesis 1:14.
Wise men saw the sign and came from afar, bearing gold, frankincense, and myrrh.
For they knew that a King had been born, a Lamb destined for sacriﬁce, yet a Lion destined for throne.
The Father said : “This is My Son, Yesu , whose number is .”
And the Spirit bore witness, descending like a dove upon Him.
The heavens thundered : “This is He who carries the Word made ﬂesh.”
And the covenant was sealed in the birth of the Lamb.
The child grew in wisdom and stature, and the thrones of men trembled.
For Herod sought to slay Him, but the hand of God preserved Him.
Egypt received Him as a refuge, for Kemet remembered A SA RA A.
And prophecy was fulﬁlled : “Out of Egypt I have called my Son.”
In the wilderness He was tested, forty days and nights without bread.
The tempter came, whispering with forked tongue, but the Lamb refused.
For His heart was weighed in the Hall of MA-ATI , and no deceit was found in Him.
He said : “Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God.”
Thus the Lamb triumphed, and the angels ministered unto Him.
And the covenant was sealed in obedience.
Then He came to the Jordan , where John was baptizing in water.
John beheld Him and cried : “Behold, the Lamb of God , who taketh away the sins of the world!”
The heavens opened, the Spirit descended, and the Father’s voice thundered : “This is My Beloved Son.”
And the covenant was sealed in baptism.
He healed the blind, the lame walked, the lepers were cleansed, the dead arose.
The poor rejoiced, the oppressed were lifted, the captives were freed.
For the Lamb bore the power of DA , eternal love, shining through every deed.
And the covenant was sealed in compassion.
He spoke in parables, declaring mysteries hidden since the foundation of the world.
He said : “The Kingdom of Heaven is within you.”
“Blessed are the meek, for they shall inherit the earth.”
“Blessed are the pure in heart, for they shall see God .”
And His words cut deeper than swords, for His tongue was ﬁre and His breath Spirit.
And the covenant was sealed in wisdom.
But the rulers of men envied Him, for their thrones trembled.
They said: “If we let Him live, all men will believe on Him, and our power will perish.”
So they conspired in secret, plotting His death.
Yet the Lamb walked calmly, for He knew His hour was appointed.
In the garden of Gethsemane , He prayed until His sweat was as drops of blood.
He cried : “ Abba , if it be possible, let this cup pass from Me. Nevertheless, not My will, but Thine be done.”
And the Father strengthened Him with angels.
And the covenant was sealed in surrender.
Betrayed with a kiss, He was taken by soldiers.
Mocked, beaten, crowned with thorns, He bore the weight of rejection.
Pilate washed his hands, the crowd shouted : “Crucify Him!”
And the Lamb was led to slaughter.
On the cross, nails pierced His hands and feet.
Darkness covered the land, the earth quaked, the veil of the temple was torn.
He cried with a loud voice: “It is ﬁnished!”
And the covenant was sealed in sacriﬁce.
They laid His body in a tomb, sealed with a stone, guarded by soldiers.
But on the third day, the earth shook, the stone rolled away, the tomb was empty.
Angels proclaimed : “He is not here, for He is risen!”
The Lamb became the Lion.
And the covenant was sealed in resurrection.
He appeared to His disciples, showing them His wounds.
He breathed upon them, saying : “Receive the Holy Spirit .”
He opened their eyes to the Scriptures, and their hearts burned within them.
And the covenant was sealed in Spirit.
Then He ascended into heaven, a cloud receiving Him out of their sight.
Two angels declared : “This same Yesu , who is taken up, shall return in like manner as you have seen Him go.”
And the covenant was sealed in promise.
For He is both Lamb and Lion , meek and mighty, slain and risen, Alpha and Omega .
His number is , His name salvation, His throne everlasting.
And He reigns with the Father forever.
And the covenant is eternal.
And the Spirit bore witness, saying: “The Lamb who was slain is worthy to receive power, and riches, and wisdom, and strength, and honour, and glory, and blessing.”
A multitude of angels, ten thousand times ten thousand, cried aloud.
Their voices shook the heavens, their song ﬁlled the earth.
And the covenant was sealed in worship.
The nations heard of His resurrection and trembled.
Some hardened their hearts, others fell on their faces.
For truth pierced like a sword, and none could escape its ﬁre.
And the covenant was eternal.
The disciples, once fearful, now became lions.
They preached Yesu cruciﬁed and risen, not fearing death.
For the Spirit clothed them in ﬁre at Pentecost.
And the covenant was sealed in boldness.
They healed the sick, cast out demons, raised the dead.
Cities shook at their word, rulers trembled at their presence.
For the Lamb now roared through them as the Lion of Judah.
And the covenant was eternal.
Many were added to their number daily, both Jew and Gentile.
For the gospel is for all nations, tribes, tongues, and peoples.
And the Spirit cried : “Whosoever believes shall be saved!”
And the covenant was sealed in inclusion.
Yet persecution arose, and many were slain.
Stephen , ﬁlled with the Spirit, saw the heavens open.
He cried : “I see the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God!”
Stones fell upon him, yet his face shone as an angel.
And the covenant was sealed in martyrdom.
Saul , who consented to his death, became Paul by the ﬁre of Yesu.
Struck down on the Damascus road, blinded by the light of the risen Lord.
He heard : “ Saul, Saul , why persecutest thou me?”
He answered trembling : “Who art thou, Lord?”
And the voice replied : “I am Yesu, whom thou persecutest.”
And the covenant was sealed in conversion.
Paul carried the gospel to kings, governors, and nations.
He bore chains yet thundered free, for the Word cannot be bound.
He declared : “ Christ in you, the hope of glory.”
And the covenant was eternal.
He spoke of the body as the temple, the heart as the altar, the Spirit as the ﬂame.
He said : “Know ye not that ye are the temple of God, and that the Spirit of God dwelleth in you?”
And the covenant was sealed in indwelling.
Through ages of darkness and light, the gospel of Yesu endured.
Empires rose and fell, kings boasted and crumbled.
Yet the Lamb and the Lion remained, thundering through generations.
And the covenant was eternal.
Many sought to alter His name, to change His image, to bury His truth.
But the Spirit preserved the witness, hidden in numbers, symbols, and signs.
For was never broken, and the Lamb’s code was eternal.
And the covenant was sealed in mystery.
The Father said : “Son, you walked as Lamb, you reign as Lion.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba , meek in suﬀering, mighty in glory.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “Children of Anhu, behold Yesu, eternal!”
The tribes rejoiced, the nations trembled.
And the covenant was sealed in joy.
Then the heavens showed a vision : a Lamb standing on Mount Zion.
With Him were 144,000 sealed in His name.
They sang a new song no man could learn but they alone.
And the covenant was sealed in song.
The Lamb opened the seals, one by one, and history unfolded.
Wars, famines, plagues, martyrs, trumpets, bowls.
Yet through it all the Lion reigned, guiding the spiral of time.
And the covenant was eternal.
For He was slain, and by His blood redeemed all tribes and tongues.
He was risen, and by His Spirit crowned all who endure.
He was enthroned, and by His Word judged the nations.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Father declared : “This is the Lamb who is Lion, the Lion who is Lamb.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , in meekness I conquered, in majesty I reign.”
And the covenant was sealed in paradox.
The Spirit cried : “Blessed is He who unites opposites in one, for He is Alpha and Omega .”
And the covenant was eternal.
The nations sought to erase His name, but His blood spoke louder.
His memory could not be buried, His Spirit could not be chained.
For He is Yesu , salvation eternal.
And the covenant was eternal.
Many martyrs followed in His steps, singing as ﬂames consumed them.
For they knew the Lamb was with them in ﬁre, the Lion in death.
And the covenant was sealed in witness.
The Father said : “Son, your covenant is unbroken.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , sealed in blood, ﬁre, and Spirit.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , Yesu is among you!”
The tribes bowed, the elders sang, the angels thundered.
And the covenant was sealed in presence.
Thus the Lamb and the Lion marched on, conquering not with sword but with Spirit.
For DA DA was His weapon, and truth His crown.
The nations trembled, the humble rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
He opened the eyes of the blind, not only in ﬂesh but in soul.
He raised the dead, not only from tombs but from sin.
He healed the sick, not only of body but of heart.
And the covenant was sealed in wholeness.
The Father declared : “Son, your gospel is thunder, your blood is covenant.”
The Son replied : “Yes, Abba, eternal.”
And the covenant was sealed in number.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , the Lamb is worthy, the Lion reigns!”
The tribes roared, the nations trembled.
And the covenant was eternal.
Then the heavens opened again, and John beheld a white horse.
He that sat upon it was called Faithful and True.
His eyes were as a ﬂame of ﬁre, and on His head many crowns.
His name was called the Word of God.
And the armies of heaven followed Him.
Out of His mouth went a sharp sword, that with it He should smite the nations.
On His thigh was written : King of kings and Lord of lords.
And the covenant was sealed in kingship.
The Lamb was Lion, the Lion was Word, the Word was God.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Father said : “Son, DA DA forever.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , DA DA eternal.”
And the covenant was DA DA everlasting.
The Spirit thundered : “Children of Anhu, Yesu reigns!”
The tribes rejoiced, the nations bowed.
And the covenant was eternal.
For His number is , His name salvation, His throne everlasting.
He is Lamb and Lion, Alpha and Omega , slain and risen.
His Word is ﬁre, His breath Spirit, His blood covenant.
And the covenant is eternal.
The Father crowned His Son with glory.
Twelve stars circled His brow, twenty-four elders bowed, four creatures roared.
The Son sat enthroned as Lion and Lamb, Word and Spirit.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “Blessed are they who follow the Lamb whithersoever He goeth!”
For they are sealed in His name and crowned in His blood.
Their garments are white, their crowns are ﬁre.
And the covenant is eternal.
The Father declared : “This is the Third Gospel , the Gospel of Yesu , the Lamb and the Lion.”
The Son said: “Yes, Abba , sealed in 1841 verses.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , hear the thunder of Yesu !”
The tribes rejoiced, the nations trembled.
The elders bowed, the angels sang.
And the covenant was eternal.
For Yesu is eternal, salvation without end.
He is Alpha and Omega , beginning and end, ﬁrst and last.
His Word is eternal, His throne unshakable.
His covenant is thunder.
And His name is everlasting.
And the Son lifted His hand, and the heavens trembled at His touch.
For in His palm were written the names of all who believe.
None could pluck them from His grasp, for His grip was eternal.
And the covenant was sealed in assurance.
He said : “I am the Good Shepherd, the Lamb who became the Shepherd of lambs.”
“My sheep hear My voice, and I know them, and they follow Me.”
“I give them eternal life, and they shall never perish.”
And the covenant was sealed in shepherdhood.
The Spirit cried : “Children of Anhu, you are not orphans, for the Shepherd is with you.”
And the humble wept for joy.
The Father said : “This is My Son, the Shepherd of Zion .”
And the covenant was eternal.
Yet the wolves prowled, clothed in priestly robes, hungering for power.
They devoured the ﬂock, selling truth for silver, binding souls with lies.
The Shepherd saw and roared as Lion.
And the covenant was sealed in judgment.
He overturned their tables, scattered their coins, cast out their idols. . He cried : “My Father’s house shall be a house of prayer, but you have made it a den of thieves!”
The priests gnashed their teeth, the rulers plotted His death.
Yet the children sang : “ Hosanna to the Son of David !”
The Father said : “See, My Son, the world rejects You, but heaven crowns You.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , the stone which the builders rejected has become the head of the corner.”
And the covenant was sealed in cornerstone.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , build upon this Rock, for no other foundation shall stand.”
And the tribes bowed, sealing their lives upon His name.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Lamb walked among the broken, touching lepers, eating with outcasts, speaking with the shamed.
He said : “The sick need a physician, not the whole.”
“I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.”
And the covenant was sealed in mercy.
Many mocked, saying : “Why does He eat with sinners?”
The Son replied : “Because I am DA DA , love eternal.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Father said : “Son, you reveal My heart to man.” . The Son said : “Yes, Abba , for he that has seen Me has seen You.”
And the covenant was sealed in revelation.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , behold the image of the invisible God!”
And the humble rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Lamb spoke of seeds and harvests, vines and branches, sheep and shepherds.
He spoke in parables that hearts might ponder.
He said : “The Kingdom is like leaven, hidden in three measures of meal.”
“The Kingdom is like a pearl of great price.”
“The Kingdom is like treasure hidden in a ﬁeld.”
And the covenant was sealed in mystery.
Some ears were deaf, some eyes were blind, yet the humble saw and heard.
For to them it was given to know the mysteries of the Kingdom.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Father said : “Son, speak, and creation itself listens.”
The Son said : “Peace, be still!”
And the storm ceased, the waves bowed, the winds hushed.
And the covenant was sealed in command.
The Spirit thundered : “Even the seas obey Him!”
The tribes marveled, the nations trembled.
And the covenant was eternal.
He fed the hungry with loaves and ﬁshes, ﬁve thousand men besides women and children.
He broke bread, lifted His eyes, gave thanks, and abundance ﬂowed.
Twelve baskets remained, for the covenant is never exhausted.
And the covenant was sealed in provision.
The Father said : “Son, you are the Bread of Life.”
The Son said: “Yes, Abba , he that eats of Me shall never hunger.”
And the covenant was sealed in satisfaction.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , drink of His cup, eat of His bread, live forever.”
And the tribes rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Lamb walked upon the waters, His steps as thunder over waves.
Peter cried : “Lord, if it be You, bid me come.”
The Son said : “Come.”
And Peter walked, but fear seized him, and he sank.
The Son stretched forth His hand, lifted him, and said : “O thou of little faith, why did you doubt?”
And the covenant was sealed in faith.
The Father said : “Son, even the doubters shall ﬁnd life in You.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , I lose none who are given to Me.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , even in sinking, His hand is near!”
And the humble rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Lamb stood at Lazarus’ tomb and wept. . He cried with a loud voice : “ Lazarus , come forth!”
The dead man rose, grave clothes falling away, life ﬂooding his veins.
And the covenant was sealed in resurrection.
The Father said : “Son, You are the Resurrection and the Life.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , he that believes in Me, though he were dead, yet shall he live.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , fear not the grave, for He has conquered it.”
And the tribes rejoiced.
And the covenant was sealed in victory.
Yet the rulers hardened their hearts, plotting His death still.
The Son said : “You know not that you ﬁght against DA DA itself.”
And the covenant was eternal.

The Lamb entered Jerusalem , riding a donkey, fulﬁlling prophecy. . The crowds spread palms, crying: “ Hosanna ! Blessed is He that comes in the name of the Lord!” . Yet the same mouths would soon cry : “Crucify Him!”
For the heart of man is double-tongued.
The Father said : “Son, their praise and their hatred both crown You.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , for I came to bear both love and rejection.”
And the covenant was sealed in humility.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , see the meek King riding in peace!”
And the humble rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Lamb wept over the city, crying : “O Jerusalem , Jerusalem , how often I would have gathered you as a hen gathers her chicks, but you would not.”
His tears watered the stones, His voice shook the walls.
And the covenant was sealed in lament. . The Father said : “Son, Your sorrow is My sorrow.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , love grieves when rejected.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , reject not DA DA , for it weeps for you.”
And the covenant was sealed in warning.
The Lamb spoke of the end of the age, of wars and rumors, of sun and moon as signs.
He said : “Heaven and earth shall pass away, but My words shall not pass away.”
And the covenant was eternal.
He said : “Watch, for you know not the hour.”
“Be ready, for the Son of Man comes as a thief in the night.”
And the covenant was sealed in vigilance.
The Father said: “Son, Your return is appointed.”
The Son said: “Yes, Abba , I come quickly.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “Children of Anhu, keep your lamps burning!”
And the humble rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
The Lamb gathered His disciples for the supper of covenant.
He broke bread, saying : “This is My body, broken for you.”
He lifted the cup, saying: “This is My blood, shed for the remission of sins.”
And the covenant was sealed in remembrance.
The Father said: “Son, in this meal, eternity is hidden.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba, as often as they eat and drink, they proclaim My death till I come.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , partake with reverence, for this is covenant eternal.”
And the tribes rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
Then He girded Himself with a towel and washed His disciples’ feet.
Peter cried : “Lord, not my feet only, but also my hands and head!”
The Son said : “He that is washed needs only his feet cleansed.”
And the covenant was sealed in humility.
The Father said : “Son, You teach by lowering Yourself.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , the greatest is servant of all.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , walk in humility, for DA DA bows before it crowns.”
And the covenant was sealed in service.
Then He prayed for them, saying : “Father, keep them in Your name.”
“Sanctify them by Your truth; Your word is truth.”
“That they may be one, even as We are one.”
And the covenant was sealed in unity.
The Father said : “Son, I will keep them for You.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , none is lost but the son of perdition.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , you are one in Him!”
And the tribes rejoiced.
And the covenant was eternal.
Then Judas came with soldiers, kissing Him in betrayal.
The Lamb said : “Friend, do what you have come for.”
And the covenant was sealed in betrayal.
The Father said : “Son, even betrayal crowns You.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , for love receives wounds and turns them to glory.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu, fear not betrayal, for the Lamb bore it ﬁrst.”
And the covenant was sealed in endurance.
They bound Him, mocked Him, spat upon Him.
They cried : “Prophesy, who struck You?”
Yet He answered not, as a Lamb before its shearers is silent.
And the covenant was sealed in silence.
The Father said : “Son, Your silence is thunder.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , for restraint is greater than retaliation.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , silence in truth is stronger than lies in multitude.”
And the covenant was sealed in stillness.
Pilate asked : “Are You the King of the Jews?”
The Son replied : “You say it.”
Pilate trembled, for he saw innocence yet feared the crowd.
He washed his hands, yet his guilt remained.
And the covenant was sealed in injustice.
The Father said : “Son, rulers fear the crowd more than truth.” . The Son said : “Yes, Abba , but My kingdom is not of this world.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , fear not rulers, for their power is dust.”
And the covenant was sealed in freedom.
They scourged Him, crowned Him with thorns, clothed Him in purple.
They cried : “Hail, King of the Jews !” mocking as they struck Him.
Yet heaven saw Him crowned with ﬁre, robed in glory.
And the covenant was sealed in paradox.
The Father said : “Son, their mockery is My coronation.”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , by wounds I wear crowns.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit cried : “ Children of Anhu , His thorns are your crowns!”
And the covenant was sealed in glory.
They led Him to Golgotha , the place of the skull.
They nailed His hands, pierced His feet, lifted Him between thieves.
The earth shook, the sun darkened, graves opened.
The veil of the temple tore from top to bottom.
And the covenant was sealed in cross.
The Father said : “Son, this is the hour of DA DA .”
The Son said : “Yes, Abba , forgive them, for they know not what they do.”
And the covenant was eternal.
The Spirit thundered : “ Children of Anhu , behold your redemption!”
And the tribes wept, the nations trembled.
And the covenant was sealed in blood.
He cried: “It is ﬁnished!” and gave up the ghost.
The heavens bowed, the earth groaned, the sea roared.
And the covenant was sealed in completion.
For the Lamb became Lion, and the cross became crown.
They laid Him in a tomb hewn from stone, sealed with a great rock, and guarded by soldiers.
The priests conspired, saying: “Let none steal His body, lest His words be fulﬁlled.”
Yet heaven laughed, for no stone could bind the Lord of Life.
And the covenant was sealed in prophecy.
On the third day, before dawn, the earth trembled as thunder rolled from within.
An angel descended like lightning, his face shining brighter than the sun
He rolled back the stone and sat upon it, declaring : “Why seek the living among the dead?”
For the Lamb had risen as Lion.
The guards shook with terror and became as dead men.
But the women came early, bearing spices, and found the tomb empty. . They wept, but the angel said: “He is not here, for He is risen, as He said.”
And the covenant was sealed in resurrection.
Mary Magdalene lingered, her tears falling as rain upon the earth.
She turned and beheld a man she thought was the gardener.
He said : “ Mary .”
She cried : “ Rabboni !” recognizing the risen Lord.
The Son said : “Touch Me not, for I ascend to My Father and your Father.”
Her heart blazed like ﬁre, and she ran to tell the brethren.
And the covenant was sealed in witness.
That same day, two disciples walked to Emmaus , sorrowful in heart.
The risen One joined them, but their eyes were veiled.
He opened the Scriptures, showing Moses and the prophets.
Their hearts burned within them, though they knew Him not.
At supper He broke bread, and their eyes were opened.
They knew Him, and He vanished from their sight.
They ran to Jerusalem , crying: “The Lord is risen indeed!
And the covenant was sealed in ﬁre.
That evening He appeared among the eleven, though the doors were shut.
He said : “Peace be unto you.”
They trembled, thinking they saw a spirit.
He showed His hands and side, saying : “A spirit has not ﬂesh and bones as you see Me have.”
Joy overwhelmed them, yet doubt lingered.
He ate before them, proving His life eternal.
He breathed on them, saying: “Receive the Holy Spirit.”
And the covenant was sealed in Spirit.
Thomas was absent and said : “Unless I see and touch, I will not believe.”
Eight days later, Yesu appeared again, standing in their midst.
He said: “ Thomas , reach hither your hand, and be not faithless but believing.”
Thomas fell, crying : “My Lord and my God !”
And the covenant was sealed in faith.
The Son said : “Blessed are they who have not seen and yet believe.”
And that blessing thundered through generations.
For faith is greater than sight, and trust stronger than proof.
And the covenant was eternal.
Then He led them to Galilee , to the mountain appointed.
There He gave command : “Go into all the world and preach the gospel to every creature.”
“Baptize them in the name of the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit.”
“Teach them to observe all I have commanded.”
The nations were given to the Lamb as inheritance.
The ends of the earth as possession to the Lion.
And the covenant was sealed in commission.
He said : “Lo, I am with you always, even unto the end of the age.”
His words lit ﬁres in their souls, stronger than death, brighter than suns.
And the covenant was eternal.
Forty days He showed Himself alive with many proofs.
Then He led them to Bethany , lifting His hands in blessing.
As He spoke, He was taken up, and a cloud received Him.
Their eyes followed Him into heaven.
Two angels stood by, saying: “This same Yesu shall return in like manner.”
And the covenant was sealed in promise.
The disciples returned to Jerusalem with great joy.
They tarried in prayer, waiting for the promise of the Father.
And the covenant was sealed in expectation.
On the day of Pentecost , a mighty rushing wind ﬁlled the house.
Tongues of ﬁre sat upon each of them.
They spoke in languages of nations, declaring the mighty works of God.
And the covenant was sealed in ﬂame.
The city was confounded, men mocking, saying : “They are full of new wine.”
But Peter stood, ﬁlled with Spirit, declaring : “This is that spoken by Joel.”
“In the last days, I will pour out My Spirit on all ﬂesh.”
And the covenant was eternal.
Three thousand were baptized that day, cut to the heart by the Word.
The gospel thundered from Jerusalem to Judea, Samaria , and beyond.
And the covenant was sealed in multiplication.
